name: HTTP Error Rate > 5%
message:
@slack-imbobi @devops-team
Error rate exceeded threshold

Current: {{value}}%
Threshold: 5%
Window: 5 minutes

Action items:
1. Check logs in Datadog
2. Identify affected endpoints
3. Rollback if recent deploy

{{#is_alert}}
  PagerDuty escalation activated
{{/is_alert}}
escalation_message: @pagerduty-imbobi Error rate breach - immediate action required

name: HTTP Latency P95 > 500ms
message:
@slack-imbobi
API latency degradation detected

Current P95: {{value}}ms
Threshold: 500ms
Window: 5 minutes

Action items:
1. Check database performance
2. Verify cache hit rate
3. Check S3 operations
4. Review recent deployments

name: Database Connection Pool Exhausted
message:
@slack-imbobi @devops-team @pagerduty-imbobi
🚨 CRITICAL: Database connection pool exhausted

Queued connections: {{value}}
Threshold: 10
Service: Prisma

Immediate actions:
1. Check database connectivity
2. Terminate idle connections
3. Scale read replicas
4. Prepare for failover

ESCALATE to on-call DBA
escalation_message: @pagerduty-imbobi CRITICAL: DB connection pool exhausted - requires immediate attention

name: Database Connection Errors
message:
@slack-imbobi @devops-team @pagerduty-imbobi
🚨 CRITICAL: Database connection failures detected

Errors in last minute: {{value}}

Immediate actions:
1. Verify database status
2. Check network connectivity
3. Review recent schema changes
4. Prepare rollback plan

Trigger incident response

name: Disk Space Critical < 10%
message:
@slack-imbobi @devops-team @pagerduty-imbobi
🚨 CRITICAL: Disk space critically low

Usage: {{value}}%
Available: <10%

Immediate actions:
1. Scale EBS volume
2. Archive old logs
3. Clean temporary files
4. Monitor growth rate

Estimated time to full: ~6 hours (estimate)

name: Dead Letter Queue Has Messages
message:
@slack-imbobi @devops-team
🚨 CRITICAL: Dead letter queue has unprocessable jobs

Dead letters: {{value}}
Job types: liberacao-parcela

Actions:
1. Investigate job failures
2. Review BullMQ logs
3. Identify root cause
4. Implement fix
5. Reprocess from DLQ

This impacts financial operations!

name: Memory Usage > 85%
message:
@slack-imbobi
Memory usage exceeding safe threshold

Current: {{value}}%
Threshold: 85%

Actions:
1. Check for memory leaks
2. Monitor garbage collection
3. Review recent deployments
4. Scale if sustained

name: Redis Memory > 80%
message:
@slack-imbobi
Redis memory usage high

Current: {{value}}%
Threshold: 80%

Actions:
1. Analyze eviction policy
2. Check cache TTLs
3. Monitor hit rate
4. Scale if needed

name: Cache Hit Rate < 50%
message:
@slack-imbobi
Cache hit rate degradation

Current: {{value}}%
Threshold: 50%

Actions:
1. Review cache keys
2. Check TTL policies
3. Analyze cache misses
4. Optimize cache strategy

name: Queue Job Failure Rate > 1%
message:
@slack-imbobi
Queue job failure rate elevated

Failure rate: {{value}}%
Threshold: 1%

Actions:
1. Check job logs
2. Verify Redis connectivity
3. Review retry logic
4. Investigate failed jobs

name: S3 Upload Failures Detected
message:
@slack-imbobi @devops-team
🚨 CRITICAL: S3 upload failures detected

Errors in 5 min: {{value}}
Threshold: 3

Impact: Users cannot upload project photos

Actions:
1. Verify AWS credentials
2. Check S3 bucket permissions
3. Monitor S3 rate limits
4. Check network connectivity

Priority: HIGH - impacts core business

name: Authentication Failures Spike
message:
@slack-imbobi
Suspicious authentication failures

Auth errors (5 min): {{value}}
Threshold: 20

Possible causes:
1. Credential rotation
2. Token expiration issue
3. Permission changes
4. Brute force attempt

Actions:
1. Review auth logs
2. Check token validity
3. Verify JWT secrets
4. Alert security team if suspicious

name: DB Slow Queries Detected
message:
@slack-imbobi
Slow database queries detected

Slow queries (5 min): {{value}}
Threshold: 5

Actions:
1. Identify slow query patterns
2. Check query plans
3. Add indexes if needed
4. Review table statistics

name: Uptime SLA Breach Alert
message:
@slack-imbobi @devops-team @pagerduty-imbobi
🚨 CRITICAL: SLA BREACH DETECTED

Uptime Target: 99.5% (21.6 min downtime/week)
Current Error Rate: {{value}}%
Window: Last hour

This triggers:
- PagerDuty escalation
- Incident declaration
- Management notification
- Customer SLA credits

Immediate response required

name: Connection Pool Available < 10%
message:
@slack-imbobi @devops-team
Database connection pool running out of available connections

Available: {{value}} of ~20
Threshold: 2

Actions:
1. Scale connection pool
2. Identify long-running queries
3. Terminate idle connections
4. Monitor active connections

name: Request Latency Spike Detected
message:
@slack-imbobi
Unusual latency spike detected

Current P95: {{value}}ms (2x normal)
Threshold: 1000ms
Window: Last 2 minutes

Potential causes:
1. Database overload
2. External API slowness
3. GC pause
4. Memory pressure

Actions:
1. Check traces for bottlenecks
2. Monitor resource usage
3. Review recent changes

name: Service Degradation (Error Rate + Latency)
message:
@slack-imbobi @devops-team
⚠️ ALERT: Service degradation detected

Both conditions met:
- Error rate: {{error_rate}}% (>2%)
- Latency P95: {{latency}}ms (>500ms)

This indicates potential cascade failure

Immediate actions:
1. Check service health
2. Review auto-scaling metrics
3. Identify root cause
4. Prepare rollback if needed
